name: ieee-skills-codex
description: Codex-ready IEEE communications writing, search, LaTeX, and submission skills for JSAC, TWC, TCOM, WCL, and CL manuscripts.

interface.longDescription: Codex-ready skills for searching, drafting, polishing, citing, plotting, evaluating, compiling, submitting, and revising IEEE communications-journal manuscripts for JSAC, TWC, TCOM, WCL, and CL.
defaultPrompt: Use $ieee-writing to draft an IEEE introduction.
Use $ieee-experiments to audit my simulation plan.
Use $ieee-letter to compress this into a WCL/CL letter.
Use $ieee-search to verify related work and BibTeX.
Use $ieee-latex to compile and diagnose my IEEEtran manuscript.
